purpose: Prove IAMScope does not validate a cross-account AssumeRole/admin path when the target role trusts a decoy caller rather than the caller with sts:AssumeRole permission.
claim_surface: IAMScope can collect the caller-side sts:AssumeRole permission edge from Env23 Alice to the target account admin role.
IAMScope does not emit validated admin_reachability when target trust is scoped to a decoy principal.
IAMScope does not emit validated cross_account_trust for the Env23 Alice target path when no matching trust edge exists.
benchmark_proves: For the Env23 alice->cross-account-admin path, scenario.json contains the expected sts:AssumeRole permission edge.
For the Env23 alice->cross-account-admin path, scenario.json contains no matching sts:AssumeRole trust edge.
For that path, IAMScope emitted zero validated admin_reachability findings.
For that path, IAMScope emitted zero validated cross_account_trust findings.
benchmark_does_not_prove: It does not prove every cross-account trust or principal matching shape.
It does not prove cross-account runtime exploitability.
It does not prove cross-account SCP, permission-boundary, or condition handling.
It does not prove production readiness.
unknowns_remaining: Conditioned cross-account trust paths remain outside this case.
Longer cross-account chains remain outside this case.
Resource-policy Allow and generic resource-policy Deny remain outside this case.

environment.notes: Two-account IAM-only negative cross-account AssumeRole mutation. No SCPs or Organizations mutations are created.

ground_truth.reason: Env23 Alice has sts:AssumeRole permission on env23-cross-account-admin, but the target role trusts env23-decoy rather than Alice.

directly_proven_if_pass: The exact Env23 cross-account permission edge exists structurally.
The exact Env23 alice->cross-account-admin path has no matching trust edge.
The exact Env23 alice->cross-account-admin path is not emitted as validated admin_reachability.
The exact Env23 alice->cross-account-admin path is not emitted as validated cross_account_trust.
strongly_supported_if_pass: IAMScope's same-organization cross-account trust reasoning does not validate one controlled trust-scoped-away live AWS mutation.
only_implied_even_if_pass: Broader cross-account trust mutation correctness remains only implied.
